description:
Advances: none (epic wrapper — children advance specled.spec_review, a new subject authored as first child task)

Self-contained HTML artifact rendered by a new `mix spec.review` task. Spec-first navigation: each affected subject is a card with the prose statement headline + tabs (Spec / Code / Coverage / Decisions). Top triage panel for findings (collapses to green check when clean). Misc panel for unmapped changes. Same artifact runs locally and in CI (deployed to gh-pages, linked from PR comment). v1 is pure viewer — acceptance state, persistent durability, and per-subject sign-off are explicit non-goals.

Approved spec: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/plans/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/2026-05-03-spec-aware-pr-review/00-spec.md
title: [EPIC] spec-aware PR review (HTML viewer)
